description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a prominent cylindrical barrel and a boxy receiver. The stock is minimalistic and straight, with a flat buttplate, suggesting a focus on portability and ease of use in urban environments. The upper receiver is equipped with a raised sight rail, supporting a flip-up iron sight for quick target acquisition. The magazine is inserted in front of the trigger guard, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for a secure hold. The muzzle end appears to have a device attached, likely a muzzle brake or compensator, to reduce recoil. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for law enforcement or military use.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a straight stock, raised sight rail, and a cylindrical barrel, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device and the flip-up iron sight aligned above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the straight stock, cylindrical barrel, raised sight rail, and the magazine in front of the trigger.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the sight rail and iron sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with the magazine and grip visible.
